modalImage.alternateText: The Return Of The Living Dead

metadata.synopsis: On his first day at a medical supply warehouse, Freddy (Thom Mathews) unwittingly releases toxic gas from a secret U.S. military canister. The gas reanimates an army of corpses, who arise from their graves with a ravenous hunger...for human brains!
metadata.title: The Return Of The Living Dead

metadata.synopsis: In this horror cult-classic, Vincent and his sister own the "Motel Hello," where they sell their delicious smoked meats made fresh on their farm. But something strange is going on over there. Folks are checking in...but no one is checking out!
metadata.title: Motel Hell

metadata.synopsis: Lefty Enright (Dennis Hopper) seeks to avenge the murder of his kin by Leatherface, Chop-Top, The Cook and Grandpa. With the help of a radio DJ he finds his way to their underground slaughter shop, where a battle of epic proportions will soon rage.
metadata.title: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre 2

metadata.synopsis: Only young Andy realizes that his doll, Chucky, is inhabited by the soul of a killer and is responsible for a spate of gruesome murders. But the real terror begins when Chucky becomes determined to transfer his evil spirit to a human being... Andy!
metadata.title: Child's Play (1988)

metadata.synopsis: 65 years after a serial killer terrorized the town of Texarkana, the so-called 'moonlight murders' begin again. Is it a copycat or something even more sinister? A lonely high school girl, with dark secrets of her own, may be the key to catching him.
metadata.title: The Town That Dreaded Sundown (2014)

metadata.synopsis: Jon Voight and Eric Roberts turn in Oscar®-nominated performances as a pair of escaped convicts who hop a freight train, but when the engineer dies of a heart attack, they find themselves trapped, alone and speeding toward certain disaster.

metadata.synopsis: In this nail-biting action film, when an aging hitman (Charles Bronson) takes on an eager apprentice (Jan-Michael Vincent) they become an unmatchable team of killers...until the pupil's ruthlessness puts the two on a deadly collision course!
metadata.title: The Mechanic

metadata.synopsis: Cinema tough guy Charles Bronson stars as Majestyk, an ex-con and Vietnam vet, whose efforts to run a farm are thwarted by narrow-minded locals and corrupt cops. But when a Mafia hitman destroys his crop, the farmer's fuse is finally blown.
metadata.title: Mr. Majestyk

metadata.synopsis: Charles Bronson stars as an LAPD cop framed for murder by Joan Freeman, a vicious ex-con he had put in prison. Going on the run and handcuffed to a foul-mouthed petty thief, he attempts to track down Freeman even as she keeps killing his associates.
metadata.title: Murphy's Law

metadata.synopsis: Action superstar Charles Bronson is at his two-fisted best in this gritty thriller about a hardnosed vice cop who is hellbent on wiping out a child prostitution ring after an assault on his young daughter; taking vengeance into his own hands!
metadata.title: Kinjite: Forbidden Subjects

metadata.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark

metadata.synopsis: A beautiful young girl named Amalia.(played by actress Amalia Aguilar). with a talent for Rumba, wants to become a glamorous cabaret singer. Her dream is encouraged by her best friend, Ernesto, (Tito Novaro), who also happens to be a gifted composer. While working towards her career goal, Amalia meets the ultimate "bad-boy", a dashing gangster named Luis, (Victor Junco). She is quickly swept off her feet and falls in love with him. Unfortunately, Luis has a jealous streak and a rather possessive personality, especially when it comes to women. He also has a prior girlfriend named Celia, (Yadira Jimenez). Celia also happens to share similar traits with Luis and is filled with jealous rage toward Amelia. So much so that she causes her rival in love to have an accident which leaves Amalia's face horribly scarred-so much so that she must now wear a mask in public. Filled with shame and fear of rejection, she decides to leave Luis without explanation or saying farewell, Her actions anger her former lover, who thinks she left him for better career opportunities. So, he decides to kill poor disfigured Amalia.
metadata.title: Amor perdido
